items.title: Auto Reply Setup (JCL)
items.note: Salam, tracking JCL's pending auto-reply setup with an external vendor (Andrew King), still not live as of 7/15. Naz chasing directly. Assigned to: Nacer Amrouch. / Detached from its parent (was a subitem of Website) -- that parent lives on Web+SEO, not CRM. Now a standalone item on CRM, default-assigned to Ahmed Memon + Ali Shaheer -- still needs a real updateBody written before it can be sent (none was ever captured).

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

• Context: JCL's auto-reply system is being set up on ZohoVoice. As of 7/15, the setup is still not live despite being pending for some time. This is critical for client intake workflow and lead response time.

• Deliverable: Chase Andrew King for completion status and timeline on the ZohoVoice auto-reply setup. Escalate if there's been radio silence or unclear delivery date. Get confirmation that the system is configured, tested, and ready to go live.

• Dependencies: Blocked on Andrew King (external vendor) to complete his portion of the ZohoVoice setup. Cannot go live until his work is done and verified.

• Done: Auto-reply is live and confirmed working in JCL's ZohoVoice system, or we have a firm delivery date from Andrew King with next steps clearly defined.
@Nacer Amrouch 
@Ahmed Memon

items.title: Creative Refresh
items.note: Update on existing 'New Subscription Box Creatives' subitem: July creative fatigue is dragging down a 4.56x ROAS Meta campaign. Haney sending fresh video/photo content; Sohib providing content/segmentation recommendations. Assigned to: Ads Team.

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • Update from the 7/17 90 day review call with Haney and Hoda: Meta ads have driven a 4.56x ROAS over the test period, but creative fatigue set in during July and is already dragging performance down.
  • Haney is sending fresh video and photo content for new creatives. Use it alongside our content and segmentation recommendations to refresh the subscription box creative set.
  • Keep messaging unified across Muslim and mainstream audiences, no explicit segmentation, per the brand direction confirmed on the call.
  • Waiting on client: Haney to send video/photo assets before new creatives can go live.

@Ads Team

items.title: Marketing Dashboard
items.note: Sequenced 2026-07-22 (Naz -- "tasks are right but need to be more logical"): this dashboard depends on GHL existing first, and Billy Doe Meats doesn't have one yet. Restructured into Step 1 (GHL buildout) then Step 2 (Shopify+Meta dashboard) in one item instead of drafting the dashboard as if it were standalone-ready. / Assigned to: Ahmed Memon, Ali Shaheer

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • New deliverable from the 7/17 Billy Doe Meats review: build a reporting dashboard that integrates Shopify sales data with Meta ad performance so ROAS and profit margin (currently 18 to 30%) can be tracked in one place.
  • Sequenced, GHL first: Billy Doe Meats has no GHL account set up yet.
    Step 1: build out the core GHL account/backend, same starting point as every other client's rollout.
    Step 2: build the Shopify + Meta dashboard on top of it once GHL is live. Don't start step 2 before step 1 is actually done.
  • This supports the client's push toward holiday campaign planning and closer budget tracking as the account scales.
  • Done when GHL is live for Billy Doe Meats AND the dashboard is pulling both Shopify and Meta data automatically.

@Ahmed Memon @Ali Shaheer

items.title: Patient vs Lead
items.note: From the 7/19 review call: GHL contacts need to reliably distinguish patient vs. lead so list cleanup and reporting aren't muddied by closed patients still showing as active leads. Once that tagging is clean, build an AI note scraper that reads call/GHL notes and auto-applies the patient/lead tag going forward. Separate from the existing Duplicate Contacts cleanup (already Done), which was about removing duplicate records, not classifying patient vs. lead. / Assigned to: Ahmed Memon, Ali Shaheer

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • From the 7/19 review call: GHL contacts need to reliably distinguish patient vs. lead so list cleanup and reporting aren't muddied by closed patients still showing as active leads.
  • Once that tagging is clean, build an AI note scraper that reads call/GHL notes and auto-applies the patient/lead tag going forward, so this doesn't need manual upkeep.
  • This is separate from the existing Duplicate Contacts cleanup (already Done) since that was about removing duplicate records, not classifying patient vs. lead.

@Ahmed Memon @Ali Shaheer

items.title: Call Routing Lag
items.note: From the 7/19 review call: calls transferring from the GHL number to the office phones are lagging or dropping. Find the root cause (call forwarding config, GHL phone system settings, etc.) and fix so transfers are near-instant. A dropped or slow transfer during a live call risks losing the patient before they reach the front desk. / Assigned to: Ahmed Memon, Ali Shaheer

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • From the 7/19 review call: calls transferring from the GHL number to the office phones are lagging or dropping.
  • Find the root cause (call forwarding config, GHL phone system settings, etc.) and fix so transfers are near-instant.
  • Why this matters: a dropped or slow transfer during a live call risks losing the patient before they reach the front desk.

@Ahmed Memon @Ali Shaheer

items.title: Marketing Dashboard
items.note:
Assigned to: Ahmed Memon, Ali Shaheer

Sohib wants a HIPAA-compliant dashboard that pulls GHL, Open Dental, and ad-platform data into one real-time view: spend by channel, leads by source, conversions, and patient value/booking outcomes. Came up twice across the 7/19 review call as the fix for reporting confusion that's been slowing down budget decisions (e.g. the Google vs. Meta reallocation call).

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • Client wants a HIPAA-compliant dashboard that pulls GHL, Open Dental, and ad-platform data into one real-time view.
  • Needs to show: spend by channel, leads by source, conversions, and patient value/booking outcomes.

@Ahmed Memon @Ali Shaheer
